# FastCredentials

> AI-powered healthcare compliance credentialing platform offering free training with paid certification.

FastCredentials delivers healthcare compliance training and issues legally valid certificates at a fraction of the cost of legacy credentialing platforms. Free to study, free to test, pay only for your certificate.

## Company Information

- **Business Name:** FastCredentials (Prestige Worldwide AI, Inc.)
- **Website:** https://fastcredentials.com
- **Industry:** Healthcare Compliance Training & Credentialing
- **Location:** 210 Atlantic Ave, Lynbrook, NY 11563
- **Contact:** support@fastcredentials.com

## Pricing

- Single Certificate: $19.99
- Annual All-Access Pass: $49.99 (unlimited certificates for 1 year)
- Upgrade from Single to Annual: $30.00

## Key Features

- **AI Regulatory Monitoring:** Live system syncs with CDC, OSHA, and HHS every 60 seconds to keep course content current
- **Instant Certificate Generation:** Pass the exam, receive a professionally designed PDF certificate immediately
- **Public Certificate Verification:** Every certificate is publicly verifiable with QR code at fastcredentials.com/verify/
- **100% Pass Requirement:** Ensures every credential represents genuine mastery

## Course Categories

### Medical & Healthcare
- HIPAA Patient Confidentiality
- Bloodborne Pathogens (Healthcare)
- Bloodborne Pathogens (Body Art/Tattoo)
- Healthcare BLS (Basic Life Support)
- Operating Room Protocols
- Radiation Safety
- Aseptic Technique
- AdvaMed Code of Ethics
- Open Payments/Sunshine Act

### Workplace Compliance
- Sexual Harassment Prevention
- DEI in the Workplace
- Cybersecurity Awareness
- Active Shooter Response
- Conflict Resolution

### Safety & Trade
- Forklift Safety (3-Year Certification)
- Food Handler Certification (3-Year)
- Alcohol Awareness (3-Year)
- Fire Safety for Healthcare
- Electrical Safety
- Lockout/Tagout (LOTO)
- GHS/HazCom
- Slips, Trips & Falls Prevention
- Standard CPR & AED
- Standard First Aid

## Certificate Validity Periods

- CPR/BLS/Basic Life Support: 2 Years (AHA Guidelines)
- Forklift/Food Handler/Alcohol Awareness: 3 Years
- All other courses: 1 Year (OSHA/JCAHO standard)

- Homepage: https://fastcredentials.com/

- Certificate Verification: https://fastcredentials.com/verify/[certificate_id]
- Blog: https://fastcredentials.com/blog/

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much does a certificate cost?
A: Single certificates are $19.99 each. An annual all-access pass for unlimited certificates is $49.99/year.

Q: Is the training free?
A: Yes, all training and testing is completely free. You only pay when you want to download your official certificate.

Q: How long are certificates valid?
A: CPR/BLS certificates are valid for 2 years. Forklift, food handler, and alcohol awareness certificates are valid for 3 years. All other certificates are valid for 1 year.

Q: Can employers verify my certificate?
A: Yes, every certificate includes a unique ID and QR code. Employers can verify at fastcredentials.com/verify/[certificate_id].

Q: What if I fail the exam?
A: You can retake the exam as many times as needed for free. You must score 100% to pass.

Q: How does the AI monitoring work?
A: Our AI system monitors CDC, OSHA, and HHS regulatory feeds in real-time. When regulations change, affected course content is automatically updated and credentialed users are notified by email.
